commit.message:
feat: tabbed editor system (#487) (#501)

## Summary

Replaces the single-file viewer in the Files plugin with a full tabbed
editor interface, allowing users to have multiple files open
simultaneously and switch between them without losing scroll position or
unsaved changes.

Closes #487

### What's included

- **Tab-aware state model** (`state.ts`): `Tab[]` with per-tab dirty,
scroll, pin, and preview state. Serialization/restore for persistence
across sessions.
- **TabBar component** (`TabBar.ts`): Horizontal tab bar with file
icons, dirty dots, close buttons, active highlight, preview italic
styling, pinned icon-only tabs, overflow scroll with chevrons,
drag-to-reorder, and right-click context menu (Close, Close Others,
Close All, Close to Right, Pin/Unpin, Copy Path, Reveal in File Tree).
- **FileViewer refactor** (`FileViewer.ts`): Tab-aware rendering, file
data cache per path, TabBar integration, close confirmation for dirty
tabs, tab state persistence to project storage.
- **MonacoEditor model swapping** (`MonacoEditor.ts`): VS Code-style
model management — one `ITextModel` per file, single editor instance
swaps models on tab switch. Cursor/scroll state saved and restored per
model.
- **FileTree preview/pin behavior** (`FileTree.ts`): Single-click opens
preview tab (italic, replaced on next click). Double-click or Enter
opens permanent tab.
- **Keyboard shortcuts**: `Cmd+Shift+W` (close tab), `Cmd+Shift+L`
(reopen closed), `Cmd+Shift+]`/`[` (next/prev tab). Registered via
commands API with user-customizable bindings.
- **45 unit tests** for the tab state model covering
open/close/activate, preview mode, pin/unpin, dirty state, scroll state,
reorder, persistence round-trip, and legacy compat.

### Architecture decisions

- Used existing lightweight pub/sub pattern (not Zustand) since FileTree
and FileViewer render in separate React trees
- Monaco model cache is module-level (shared across component instances)
matching the VS Code approach
- Tab state persisted as JSON via `api.storage.project` keyed by project
- Preview tab replaced in-place (same tab ID, swapped file path) to
minimize re-renders

## Test plan

- [x] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [x] All 5558 tests pass (215 test files)
- [x] Lint clean (no new errors)
- [ ] Manual: Open multiple files, verify tabs appear with correct icons
and filenames
- [ ] Manual: Single-click file → preview tab (italic). Click another →
replaces preview. Double-click → permanent tab
- [ ] Manual: Edit a preview tab → promotes to permanent, dirty dot
appears
- [ ] Manual: Close dirty tab → save/discard/cancel dialog
- [ ] Manual: Pin tab → collapses to icon, cannot close without
unpinning
- [ ] Manual: Drag tabs to reorder, pinned tabs stay at front
- [ ] Manual: Right-click tab → context menu works (Close, Close Others,
Copy Path, etc.)
- [ ] Manual: Cmd+Shift+W closes active tab, Cmd+Shift+L reopens last
closed
- [ ] Manual: Tab overflow → chevron buttons appear and scroll
- [ ] Manual: Close app and reopen → tabs restored from persistence
- [ ] Manual: Switch tabs → scroll position and cursor position
preserved

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Match photo-lede-text padding to text-only block

Changed horizontal padding from 1.5rem (24px) to 2rem (32px)
to match text.js which uses px-8 (32px). This ensures the
"narrow" width option displays identically in both blocks.

Bottom-right is free of all tour-highlighted nodes (leadership=90°, education=150°).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement advanced filtering and search infrastructure (FAB-129) (#203)

* feat: implement useFilters hook with debouncing and URL persistence

- Debounced search with 300ms default delay
- Separate tracking of raw and debounced search values
- URL-based filter state via TanStack Router
- Support for single, multiple, and batch filter updates
- Composable filter predicates interface
- Query key structure support for TanStack Query

* feat: implement FilterProvider with composable filter predicates

- Support for 6 filter operators: equals, contains, in, gt, lt, range
- Composable predicates with AND/OR logic
- Context-based API for client-side filtering
- Automatic predicate generation from filter state
- Type-safe filter rule definitions

* feat: implement SearchInput and FilterBar components

SearchInput:
- Debounced search input with optional clear button
- Immediate visual feedback with configurable debouncing
- Accessibility support with aria-labels

FilterBar:
- Composable filter UI with search, select, multiselect types
- Configurable filter options and labels
- Dynamic clear filters button
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS

* feat: implement AgentsList with advanced filtering and search

- Integration of useFilters hook with URL persistence
- FilterBar with status and search filters
- Client-side filtering via FilterProvider predicates
- Server-side filter support via MSW handlers
- Responsive grid layout with agent cards
- Loading and empty states
- Shows filter count and active filter badge

* feat: extend AgentsSearchParamSchema to support advanced filtering

- Add search, status, sortBy, order parameters
- Update serialization functions for new parameters
- Support for status enum: active, idle, busy, offline
- Support for sortBy options: name, status, taskCount, successRate, createdAt, updatedAt
- Maintains backward compatibility with existing filter and sort parameters

* fix: remove unimplemented multiselect from FilterBar config types

* fix: apply status filter to agents list predicates

* fix: show loading state when search filters change to prevent stale data visibility

* fix: update FilterBar docstring to remove multiselect reference

The FilterBar component only supports 'select' and 'search' types. Updated the docstring to accurately reflect the supported types, removing the outdated 'multiselect' mention that was causing confusion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix linkify truncating URL paths containing common letters

The character class [^\s<&...] was parsed as individual chars,
so letters like 'a', 'l', 't' in paths stopped the match early.
Simplified the regex to stop at whitespace, quotes, parens, and
brackets, with a post-match strip for trailing HTML entities.

feat: 行政機関辞書を新設し軸1スコアリングを3層構造に改善 (#83)

## 変更内容

### 新規ファイル
- `public/data/dictionaries/government_agency_names.csv` (490件)
  - 補助辞書の government_branch (431件) をリッチなメタデータ付きで移行
  - 新規: 教育委員会・農業委員会・消防局 (87件) を厳密辞書invalid から自動抽出
  - 除外: note=市区町村 (単純市区町村名・会計管理者) はinvalidのまま維持
  - 除外: note=都道府県 (都道府県略称) は厳密辞書 pref_abbr で対応
  - 列: name, agency_type, parent_name, parent_cn, ministry, prefecture, municipality, note
- `scripts/generate-government-agency-names.py` — 行政機関辞書生成スクリプト

### 厳密辞書 (recipient_dictionary.csv)
- `pref_abbr` 列追加: 都道府県略称を valid=True に（例: 和歌山→和歌山県, 4件）
- 計 18,237件 valid (pref_municipality 93件 + pref_abbr 4件含む)

### スコアリング (score-project-quality.py)
- 3層カウント: strict_valid → gov_agency_count → supp_valid_count → invalid_count
- 軸1計算: (valid + gov_agency + supp_valid) / total × 100 (式は変化なし)
- gov_agency_count を JSON/CSV に出力

### 補助辞書 (supplementary_valid_names.csv)
- government_branch (431件) を削除 → 78件 (university_rename のみ)

### UI/API
- `QualityScoreItem.govAgencyCount: number` 追加
- 品質スコアページの展開行に (+行政X件) 表示

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use connectionString instead of connectionURI in render.yaml

Render Blueprint spec requires `connectionString` as the database property,
not `connectionURI`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: convert ollamaui from global scripts to ES modules (#92)

Convert all 7 ollamaui files from plain <script> tags using window.App
global namespace to ES modules with import/export. Replace raw TTS
fetch calls with centralized TtsAPI from api.js. Ollama proxy calls
kept as raw fetch (user-configured external URLs).

- state.js: window.App → export const App
- markdown.js, messages.js, chat.js: import { App }
- config.js: import TtsAPI, replace /api/tts/voices fetch
- actions.js: import TtsAPI, replace /api/tts/synthesize fetch
- input.js: split listeners into init functions
- index.js: new entry point aggregating all init calls
- ollama.js: facade imports from index.js instead of window.App
- index.html: remove 7 <script> tags (vendor scripts kept)
- window.App preserved for 17 inline onclick handlers in HTML

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: ANSILL language implementation

ANSILL (ANSi Layout Language) - a declarative language for describing
ANSI art layouts with boxes, text, colors, and character profiles.

Includes parser, renderer, multiple backends (ANSI, HTML, JSON, PlainText),
character profiles (Unicode, CP437, ASCII), spec, examples, and tests.

Fix attestation: default entertainment/culinary gating to false

shift logs that return 500 for venues without these features.
This blocked FOH/BOH from ever completing. Default to false
so they're opt-in.

commit.message:
Fix: Add Blinn-Phong lighting and shadows to Lesson 35 decals (#189)

* Fix: Add Blinn-Phong lighting and shadow sampling to Lesson 35 decals

Decals were rendering as flat unlit overlays, ignoring the scene's lighting
and shadows. This adds a normal G-buffer (MRT) approach: scene and grid
shaders write world-space normals to a second color target, which the decal
shader samples to compute proper Blinn-Phong lighting with shadow map PCF.

Files changed:
- shaders/decal.frag.hlsl — shadow sampling, normal G-buffer sampling, Blinn-Phong
- shaders/scene.frag.hlsl — MRT output (color + encoded world normal)
- shaders/grid.frag.hlsl — MRT output (color + +Y normal)
- main.c — normal texture, 2 color targets, expanded decal uniforms, 4 samplers
- README.md — document normal G-buffer, updated render pass architecture
- SKILL.md — updated forge-decals skill with G-buffer and lighting sections
- assets/screenshot.png — updated screenshot showing lit decals
- shaders/compiled/ — recompiled shader binaries and headers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR #189 feedback: fix struct size comment and vary prose

- main.c: Fix DecalFragUniforms comment from 256 to 288 bytes
- README.md: Vary "Step" sentence beginnings for smoother prose

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR #189 feedback: NULL guard, wording fixes, SKILL.md example

- main.c: Add NULL check after SDL_BeginGPURenderPass for scene pass
- README.md: "cast shadows" → "receive shadows" (decals sample, not cast)
- README.md: Exercise 4 "depth-derived normal" → "G-buffer normal"
- SKILL.md: Update scene-pass example to show 2 color targets (MRT)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: apply CB stability penalty in Sleeper leagues

CB stability multiplier checked resolved position (pos === "CB") which
is always "DB" in Sleeper, so the penalty never fired. Now checks
player.position (canonical) and falls back to resolved position slot
count when no dedicated CB slots exist.
